caption: Lost in the mist of a hidden waterfall cave, the air so thick with magic it clings to my skin. No one else was here but me, just the sound of water and my own heartbeat. I traced the damp stone with my fingertips, feeling the power of this place. Some things are meant to be found, not explained. 🧜‍♀️🌌 #traveladdict #sensualwanderer #hiddenparadise
